'''Roshans''' were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] beings who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Rosha]] in the [[Leemurtoo system]]. They were a tall species with strong, flexible bodies and light blue or green eyes. Their most defining features were four antennae on their heads that were as delicate as tendrils and sensitive to light, shrinking against their heads during the day and unfurling in darkness or with anxiety.

The [[Samarian]]s also lived in the same [[Star system/Legends|system]] as them. The Roshans were about to make a trade agreement with the Samarians when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] intervened.
